text: In a corner cafe overlooking Prague's old town square, a cat sat reading books. His favorite was a classic detective novel. Every morning he'd nibble breakfast then curl up among the pages. One rainy afternoon, a stranger entered. The cat watched him quietly. The man smoked a pipe and looked wary. Later, he dropped coins. The cat chased them around for joy. Later still, he met another visitor. They laughed. Then it started raining harder. They fled. Back at the cafe, they thanked him. He winked. The cat smiled knowingly.
